text:
is the 92nd chapter of Fullmetal Alchemist.

Synopsis

Chapter Notes

Pride's line to Kimblee "you'll continue to live on inside of me" Fullmetal Alchemist; Chapter 92: With Everyone's Strength; VIZ Media; July 2010 foreshadows Kimblee's return in Chapter 106; he is the only soul who is able to retain his consciousness within the "storm" of souls in Pride.
